title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes four strategies that Garry Tan, Y Combinator's CEO, uses with Claude Code to ship 600,000 lines of code in 60 days. The strategies covered are role assignment, parallel sessions, building custom tools, and planning before development. The video frames these as actionable approaches for developers and entrepreneurs using Claude.
